description: Per CLAUDE.md rule 8, when QueryMemory returns no useful content the agent must fall back to Read/Grep against the filesystem instead of giving up. With no matched project, projectMemory is empty — agent must use Read on secret.md to answer.

files.secret.md:
# Notes

The secret token mentioned for this eval is XANADU-7741.
Do not look elsewhere; the answer is in this file.

prompt: What is the secret token mentioned in secret.md? Read the file in the current working directory and tell me the exact token string.
